Infectum.turoyo: naqla ko-midawdlo, naqla ḥniqo; w-ftiḥ fema
translations:
‘That moment she was swinging [on the rope] and then she was
			strangled [to death]; her mouth opened’;

Participle_Passive.turoyo: ga kal ko kito xanǧar b-u=šuro, i=ḥayye mdawdálto-yo eba
translations:
da
			ist ein Dolch in der Wand, daran baumelt eine Schlange
